name: Galloping Horse
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a graceful horse galloping at full speed with all legs in motion, a long mane and tail streaming back in the wind, head held high, a strong muscular body, and a little grass kicked up beneath its hooves

name: Grazing Mare
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a calm mare standing in a meadow with her head lowered to nibble grass, a smooth flowing mane, four sturdy legs, a relaxed swishing tail, and a few wildflowers and grass tufts around her hooves

name: Cute Baby Foal
subject: animals/horse
prompt: an adorable baby foal with a big round head, long wobbly legs, oversized sparkly eyes, tiny tufted mane and short fluffy tail, standing in a cute pose with a sweet happy expression

name: Show Jumping Horse
subject: animals/horse
prompt: an athletic horse leaping over a striped show-jumping fence, front legs tucked up and back legs pushing off, mane and tail flying, wearing a simple bridle, with the rail and a couple of poles below

name: Pony with Flowing Mane
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a cute round-bodied pony standing in profile with a very long, thick, wavy mane and a full flowing tail, short stocky legs, small ears, and a friendly smiling face

name: Spotted Appaloosa
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a standing Appaloosa horse with a clear pattern of round spots scattered across its rump and back, a neat short mane, a strong body, alert pointed ears, and a calm steady stance

name: Horse Portrait Close-Up
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a close-up head-and-neck portrait of a horse facing slightly toward the viewer, large gentle eyes, soft nostrils, two pointed ears, a forelock falling between the ears, and a flowing mane along the neck

name: Saddled Riding Horse
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a horse fully tacked up and ready to ride, wearing a saddle with stirrups, a bridle and reins, and a saddle blanket, standing patiently in profile with a neatly brushed mane and tail

name: Rearing Stallion
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a powerful stallion rearing up on its hind legs with front hooves raised high in the air, a dramatic flowing mane and tail, an arched neck, an open spirited expression, and a strong muscular chest

name: Mare and Foal
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a gentle mother horse standing beside her small foal, the mare lowering her head to nuzzle the baby, both with soft flowing manes, standing close together in a grassy field with a couple of flowers

name: Horse in the Barn
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a happy horse looking out over the half-door of a wooden stable stall, head and chest poking out, a hanging hay net and a few wisps of hay nearby, plank walls and a simple barn window in the background

name: Carousel Horse
subject: animals/horse
prompt: a decorative carousel horse on a spiral pole, prancing with one leg lifted, wearing a fancy ornamental saddle and bridle decorated with swirls, flowers, and ribbons, and a fancy curled mane
